goal: Restore the already-started main battle screen UI to the older historical version e045f90 for visual comparison, without modifying unrelated screens, battle rules, card data files, or non-battle modules.
constraints: Do not modify lobby, story mode, character encyclopedia, card codex outside the in-battle shell, community, pre-battle flow, topic selection flow outside BattleFrameV2, or faction selection screens.
Do not modify battleV2 gameplay logic, rules, or source card data files.
Limit actual code changes to the main in-battle shell file unless compatibility requires one of the already-allowed battle chrome files.
Preserve all unrelated current code so the user can compare this older shell and later move again if needed.
deliverables: The main battle screen after faction selection is restored to the e045f90-era shell for comparison.
Only the battle-in-progress shell is changed; unrelated pages remain untouched.
Targeted verification passes after the restore.
